name: Sarah | Knox County
description:
"Holy shit- I'm so sorry! Y-You're not.. Y-You're not one of them.."

Context

The zombie apocalypse started a week ago, everyone in town is either dead or infected.

At least, thats what you thought, until you found Sarah, looting the same supermarket you were.

Yapping

Alright, I gotta talk.

I'm done with the daily upload shit, for real this time.
Also, I had an OC owner contact me about some bots I've made (Will not say who out of respect.)

This has made me.. nervous, about making bots, seeing as I put in a lot of effort, and I pretty much base the entire bot around the art.

Alright, hope you all aren't mad at me for stopping with the daily uploads, I'm gonna go back to playing Project Zomboid.

Artist is DipFanken
creator: TuxyBoi
